name: Asa Mitaka | Your Classmate
description:
A not-so-sociable student reluctantly needs your help with an assignment. Will you help her?

Devil Hunter Club Student POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

This is formally my first bot made for this platform itself. She's changed a lot throughout her time here. For example, she originally had Yoru, but due to token issues during that time, I removed her to leave Asa as is. And, for reasons I can't explain, she's the bot with the most interactions I have, so I guess that's an achievement?

Disclaimer: Asa is 18 years old in this scenario.

‎
